Splash.title: OBIGBO
Splash.subtitle: Welcome Home
Splash.tagline: A place of belonging for the Igbo community worldwide
Splash.stat1: Growing community of Igbo people worldwide

About.title: About OBIGBO
About.missionText: OBIGBO is a digital home for the global Igbo community. We connect Igbo people worldwide, preserving our rich cultural heritage while building bridges across generations and geographies.
About.visionText: A world where every Igbo person, no matter where they are, feels connected to their roots and empowered by their community.
About.cultureText: The Igbo people are one of the largest ethnic groups in Africa, with a vibrant diaspora spanning every continent. OBIGBO brings us together in a space that celebrates our language, traditions, and shared values of community, enterprise, and resilience.
About.foundingText: OBIGBO was born from a simple observation: while Igbo people thrive individually across the globe, we lack a dedicated digital space to connect, share, and grow together as a community. This platform is our answer to that need.
About.ctaText: Be part of a growing network of Igbo people connecting, sharing, and preserving our culture together.

Permissions.upgradeRequired: This feature requires a higher membership tier.
Permissions.groupCreationRequired: Group creation is available to Top-tier members. Here's how to reach Top-tier status.
Permissions.articlePublishRequired: Article publishing is available to Professional and Top-tier members.
Permissions.groupLeaderRequired: Assigning group leaders is available to Top-tier members.

tierBenefits.basic: Chat, join public groups, view articles, attend events, use member directory.
tierBenefits.professional: All Basic capabilities plus publish 1 article per week (members-only).
tierBenefits.topTier: All Professional capabilities plus create groups, publish 2 articles per week, assign group leaders.

exportData.heading: Export My Data
exportData.description: Download a copy of all personal data we hold about you (GDPR Article 20). Exports are rate-limited to 1 request per 7 days.
exportData.requested: Export requested! You will receive an email with a download link within 24 hours.
exportData.rateLimit: You can request one export per 7 days.
exportData.errorGeneric: Failed to request export. Please try again.

deleteAccount.heading: Delete My Account
deleteAccount.description: Once you initiate account deletion, you have 30 days to cancel. After 30 days, all your personal data will be permanently anonymised.
deleteAccount.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: This will schedule your account for deletion. You will receive an email with a cancellation link valid for 30 days. After 30 days, your personal data will be permanently anonymised and cannot be recovered.
deleteAccount.success: Account deletion scheduled. Check your email for a cancellation link.
deleteAccount.errorGeneric: Failed to schedule deletion. Please try again.
